message:
feat(web): improve UX polish and component enhancements

- Add skeleton loading component with shimmer animation for better loading states
- Add loading prop to Button component with spinner and disabled state
- Add checkmark draw animation to Checkbox component using framer-motion
- Improve mobile navigation: GitHub and Learn links now visible as icon buttons
- Add Home icon button to wizard mobile header for easier navigation

These changes improve the premium feel and usability of the web interface,
addressing feedback from UX audit about loading states, animations, and
mobile navigation visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
